title: API to manage my app
excerpt: Is there a way to manage my app using the Monday.com api? I would like to be able to update my app version uploading a zip file, but I would like to do it automatically

posts.author: bcarlosdacunha (Bruno Carlos da Cunha)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to manage my app using the Monday.com api? I would like to be able to update my app version uploading a zip file, but I would like to do it automatically

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, at the moment, there is no way to do that using the API. You will have to use the developer page to do that.
